schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Client Testimonials | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Client testimonials and reviews for Virtual Auditor. Real feedback from companies using our valuation, registration, tax, and compliance services.

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All testimonials are from verified clients. Available on Google Business Profile with star ratings. Chennai office: 4.6/5 (37 reviews). Bangalore office: 4.8/5 (29 reviews). JustDial: 4.7/5 (460 reviews).

mainEntity.name: Can I speak to existing clients as reference?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We can arrange reference calls with existing clients (with their permission) for high-value engagements. Contact us to request references relevant to your specific requirement.

Consistent feedback highlights: thoroughness of valuation reports, personal attention from the founder, speed of delivery, and post-engagement support. The multi-credential advantage is frequently cited.
Yes. Testimonials from SaaS startups, manufacturing companies, food businesses, and professional services firms. Industry-specific references available on request.

mainEntity.name: Where can I leave a review?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Business Profile (search Virtual Auditor Chennai/Bangalore), JustDial, or email feedback to support@virtualauditor.in. We appreciate honest feedback that helps us improve.
